dialogos.texto_en: (Being in a serious relationship with Futaro%p-2;――%p;)
(I can't say I haven't imagined it before, but...)
(B-but, that's only in my imagination!\n It's too early for us!)
(I bet Futaro feels the same way...)
(I never thought about it before,\n but maybe he wants to have\n a serious relationship with me?)
(When Futaro suggested this graduation trip,\n I was really happy.)
(But then I remembered that conversation from before%p-2;――%p;)
(Everyone else in the class thinks Futaro only cares about studying and isn't interested in girls.)
(But, I know that's not true.\n Futaro can be very reliable when it matters\n and he does have a manly side to him as well.)
(That's right! He's actually a very passionate\n and cool guy!)
(But, being passionate also means...)
(Futaro might have different intentions,\n and in reality, wants to do more things with me\n but is holding himself back.)
(So, perhaps, on this trip,\n he would like%p-2;――%p;)
(To deepen our relationship?!)
Miku.\nI...want to do something spectacular with you.
(I-i-if Futaro were to come at me like this,\n what should I do?)
(...I might want to see\n that passionate side of him...)
(But, b-b-but!\n It's still too early for us!)
(Yet, I might not be able to refuse the request\n for the one I love...)
(But, but! It's a trip with everyone!\n We can't be doing something like that!)
(Y-yet...\n If Futaro wants to, I...)
Hey, Miku.\nMiiikuuu?
HUH?!
Why did you suddenly start wriggling around like that?\nAre you alright?
(Ah!\n That's right, I was talking to Nino.)
And?\nYou tried to say something earlier, didn't you?
No, it's nothing.
Really?\nIt seems like it's not nothing though.
It's our important graduation trip, you know?\nIt might become difficult to coordinate everyone's schedule\nafter we start college.
We might not all be able to get together like this time\nfor a while.
So, if there's something you want to do, speak up.\nSo we can make fun memories together.
...Yeah.
(Nino is worried about me.\n It's typical of her to not express it directly,\n though.)
I'm really okay.
...Fine, then.
